reason: All 3 FRs and 3 NFRs from SPEC.md v2.0.0 are present and consistently traced across SRS.md, SPEC_TRACKING.md, TRACEABILITY_MATRIX.md, and TEST_INVENTORY.yaml. Canonical terminology preserved verbatim: atomic write (tmp + os.replace), shlex.split, shell=False, exit codes 0/2/4/1, 6-char injection blacklist (; | & $ > < `), p95<50ms, redaction regex (sk-[A-Za-Z0-9_-]{8,}|token=\S+), 3 TASKQ_* env vars, uuid4 first 8 hex. Pipeline progression (SRS → SPEC_TRACKING → TRACEABILITY → TEST_INVENTORY) is internally consistent. All sub-task Agent B approvals are APPROVE, round-2 patches resolved duplication. P1 traceability explicitly marked as estimation (TBD-P3 / TBD-P4), with P3 build_trace.py scheduled to fill actual mappings. Minor count discrepancies between matrix (24) and inventory (45) are documented as design difference (matrix aggregates by file cluster, inventory enumerates by function) and acceptable for P1 estimation phase.
citations: TEST_INVENTORY.yaml:1-50 (round-2 patch comment + count reconciliation note)

gaps.message: TRACEABILITY_MATRIX.md Backward Mapping (24 entries) does not list the ~21 test functions added in TEST_INVENTORY.yaml round-2 — specifically: test_fr02_run_captures_stdout_tail_under_2000_chars, test_fr02_run_captures_stderr_tail_under_2000_chars, test_fr02_run_records_duration_ms_and_finished_at, test_fr02_run_unexpected_exception_returns_one, test_fr02_cli_run_success_returns_zero, test_fr03_status_known_id_returns_full_record, test_fr03_list_truncates_command_to_50_chars, test_fr03_exit_code_matrix, test_fr03_end_to_end_submit_run_status_list_clear, test_fr03_help_text_lists_all_subcommands, test_nfr03_redact_sk_key_in_stdout, test_nfr03_redact_sk_key_in_stderr, test_nfr03_redact_token_assignment_in_stdout, test_nfr03_redact_token_assignment_in_stderr, test_nfr03_preserves_non_secret_lines, test_nfr03_secret_in_output_never_persisted_to_disk, test_config_taskq_home_default_dot_taskq, test_config_taskq_task_timeout_default_10, test_config_taskq_retry_limit_default_2. These are FR-/NFR-/config-anchored functions in TEST_INVENTORY (the P1 naming authority) that should also appear in Backward Mapping for full bidirectional traceability at P1. P3 build_trace.py is the planned fill point per the matrix's own design statement.

TRACEABILITY_MATRIX.md prose claims 'Code↔Test Mapping(24 列)' and 'Backward Mapping(25 列)' but the visible Code↔Test Mapping table contains 10 rows and Backward Mapping contains 24 entries. Both count statements are off; the '24/25 vs 45' reconciliation note in Cross-Reference Index refers to test FILE aggregation vs test FUNCTION enumeration, but Backward Mapping itself is FUNCTION-grained. Off-by-one / off-by-N count discrepancies are internally documented but not numerically accurate.

TEST_INVENTORY.yaml NFR-03 declares 5 unit tests (test_nfr03_redact_*) under fr_tests.NFR-03.unit, but no corresponding tests/unit/test_nfr03_redaction.py row exists in TRACEABILITY_MATRIX.md Code↔Test Mapping. Either the unit tests should map to a new file (e.g. tests/unit/test_nfr03_redaction.py) or be relocated under cross_cutting.security. Cross-reference between inventory and matrix is incomplete for NFR-03 unit-level coverage.

TEST_INVENTORY.yaml FR-02 declares 10 unit tests under fr_tests.FR-02.unit (vs 6 in TRACEABILITY_MATRIX Backward Mapping). The 4 added tests (stdout_tail/stderr_tail capture, duration_ms recording, unexpected exception handling) are SRS-§2-aligned per FR-02 詳細條款 (結果欄位 + 錯誤處理) but lack explicit Code↔Test Mapping entries pointing to tests/unit/test_fr02_state_machine.py or a sibling file.

TEST_INVENTORY.yaml FR-03 declares 7 unit + 2 integration tests (vs 4 in TRACEABILITY Backward Mapping). The 3 additional unit tests (status_known_id, list_truncates_command_to_50_chars, exit_code_matrix) and 2 additional integration tests (end_to_end, help_text) cover FR-03 詳細條款 behaviors but lack Backward Mapping entries and Code↔Test Mapping rows. These are net-new SRS-aligned coverage, not contradictions.

test_fr03_exit_code_matrix in TEST_INVENTORY is annotated '# parametrize over (0/2/4/1)' but the parametrize expansion is not enumerated as 4 discrete cases in any deliverable. Consistent with the test_fr01_submit_injection_chars_returns_two (parametrized over 6 chars, counted as 1 row in Backward Mapping) precedent, so this is consistent design — not a gap — but worth noting for P2 derive_test_cases.md to preserve parametrize intent.
